title: geophila obvallata subsp. pilosa
intro: Geophila obvallata subsp. pilosa, also known as Creeping Jenny, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Primulaceae family and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and promoting sleep, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Geophila obvallata subsp. pilosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
